title: Incorrect query result due to the SeekScan optimization
key_bug_features: OP_SeekScan optimization causing incorrect query results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, value REAL, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO t2(name, value) VALUES('Test2', NULL);
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE value IS NOT NULL AND id IN (SELECT id FROM t2 WHERE name LIKE 'Test%');
SELECT * FROM t2 NOT INDEXED WHERE (value < 100 AND name IS NOT NULL) OR (value > 200 AND created_at < '2023-01-01 00:00:00');
